description: AI agent self-prompting instructions for do-deal-relay referral system operations

evals.prompt: How do I add a new referral code to the system?
evals.expected_output: Referral code addition via MCP tool or API endpoint

evals.prompt: How do I query existing referral codes in the system?
evals.expected_output: Referral code query via search or listing

evals.prompt: How do I validate if a referral code is still active?
evals.expected_output: Code validation via URL check or API validation endpoint

evals.prompt: How does the system handle EU AI Act compliance for logging?
evals.expected_output: EU AI Act compliance with 180-day logging retention

evals.prompt: How do I interact with the system via MCP protocol?
evals.expected_output: MCP protocol interaction with tools and resources
